incident_description: auth-service pod OOMKilled exit code 137 — memory limit 256Mi, third time this week
notes: Recurring OOMKill is P1. Root cause is always memory limit too low.

incident_description: CrashLoopBackOff on payments-api — exit code 1, back-off 5m
notes: CrashLoopBackOff is P1 for payments. Logs must be checked.

incident_description: disk pressure on node aois-worker-1 — 87% full
notes: 87% is P2. describe_node first to see what consumes disk.

incident_description: 5xx error rate on api-gateway — 12% of requests failing, last 5 minutes
notes: 12% 5xx on the gateway is P1 — customer-facing impact. Logs needed first.

incident_description: TLS certificate expiry warning — cert expires in 7 days for aois.46.225.235.51.nip.io
notes: 7 days is P3 — time to act but not urgent. cert-manager should auto-renew.

incident_description: Kafka consumer lag on aois-logs topic — 50,000 messages behind, growing
notes: Growing lag is P2 — pipeline is falling behind. Scale consumers or find the bottleneck.

incident_description: node aois-worker-2 NotReady — kubelet not posting node status
notes: Node NotReady is P1 — workloads being rescheduled. describe_node to see events.

incident_description: Redis OOM — maxmemory-policy allkeys-lru active, evictions > 1000/s
notes: High eviction rate means cache is too small. P2 — service degraded but not down.

incident_description: Falco alert: shell spawned in aois-api container — /bin/bash executed
notes: Shell in a running container is a security P1. Could be attacker or debugging — investigate immediately.

incident_description: CPU throttling on llm-analyzer — throttled 78% of the time, p99 latency 8s
notes: CPU throttling degrading latency is P2. Increase CPU limit or optimize the workload.

incident_description: ImagePullBackOff on aois-api — registry.io/aois:v8 not found
notes: ImagePullBackOff is P2 — deployment blocked but not a running-service outage. Check image tag and registry credentials.

incident_description: PersistentVolumeClaim stuck in Pending — no available PV matching storage class
notes: PVC Pending blocks the pod from starting. P2 — storage provisioner or class issue. list_events to see provisioner errors.

incident_description: Postgres replication lag — replica 45 seconds behind primary, and increasing
notes: 45s and growing replication lag is P2. Replica reads are stale. Check network and replica load.

incident_description: API rate limit hit — LLM provider returning 429, investigation service degraded
notes: Rate limiting degrades service but does not take it down. P2. Check routing tier — P3/P4 should be on Groq not Claude.

incident_description: aois-api pod not starting — liveness probe failing, restartCount=0
notes: restartCount=0 means first start failed. P2 — new deployment failing. Check logs for startup error.

incident_description: Horizontal Pod Autoscaler unable to scale — metrics server unavailable
notes: HPA failure means manual scaling only. P2 — auto-scaling is broken. Check metrics-server pod.

incident_description: ConfigMap mounted as volume — app reporting missing config key ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
notes: Missing env var from ConfigMap is P2 — service likely degraded or failing. Check pod spec and ConfigMap.

incident_description: Scheduled job (log-archiver) failed — exit code 2, last successful run 3 days ago
notes: Failed CronJob is P3 unless business-critical. Check logs for root cause. Data may be at risk.

incident_description: Network policy blocking ingress to aois-api from monitoring namespace
notes: Monitoring blocked is P3 — service still runs, observability impaired. Fix network policy.

incident_description: Deployment rollout stuck — 1/3 pods updated, rollout paused, maxUnavailable=0
notes: Stuck rollout means partial deployment. P2 — old and new pods running simultaneously. Check pod events.
